title: AI Chat Application with Next.js
description: Complete route from zero to a production AI chat app: streaming LLM responses, auth, rate limiting, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Bootstrap a new Next.js project with TypeScript and App Router
Install UI component library for chat interface primitives
Add Zod for validating AI request/response schemas
Integrate Vercel AI SDK with OpenAI/Anthropic for streaming chat responses
Add user authentication to protect the chat interface
Add Upstash Redis for per-user rate limiting to control API costs
Persist chat history to a database with Prisma ORM
Add error monitoring to catch LLM API failures and timeouts
Deploy to Vercel — streaming responses require Edge Runtime or Node.js runtime, not static export
